perProduct.note: Confirmed local registration; residency/citizenship scope partial (cf-001).
Mandatory KYC; document scope differs individual vs business.
Risk-tier limits; not isolated for spot margin.
Available but KYC-required; conservative vs ECF AVAILABLE, accepted.
Dedicated KZT P2P market page confirmed.
KZT bank transfer; identity-bound (IIN/BIN, no third-party); conservative accepted.
KZT bank transfer/IBAN; identity-bound; conservative accepted.

Local programs exist; campaign-specific; amounts separate; no CTA/promo.

candidateShapeDecision.reason: exchange-market-cell.schema.json is additionalProperties:false; the current candidate is a superset and does NOT validate. OPTION C (current shape) is therefore not permitted.

requiredShape.cell: exact exchange-market-cell.schema.json instance (schema-valid; additionalProperties respected): exchangeId, countryCode, exchangeLegalEntity, overallAvailability, registrationStatus, productStatuses, rankingEligibility, ctaEligibility, promoEligibility, confidence, freshness, checkedDate, nextReviewDate, reasonCodes, limitations, sourceIds, conflictIds, alternativeExchangeIds, liveVerificationState

candidateShapeDecision.toBeAppliedBy: a follow-up staging re-run (owner-gated) that emits exchange-market-cell.candidate.json in OPTION A shape; this review does not modify staging files.

productScope.schema: market-source.schema.json productScope = array of strings (multi-value allowed)
productScope.decision: Populate productScope as an ARRAY derived deterministically from the claim categories of the claims each source supports (via claim-source links). No fabrication; multi-product sources retain ALL applicable scope tokens.
productScope.rule: productScope[source] = sorted union of tokens over categories of that source's supported claims; empty array if no verified supported claim.

claimType.decision: DO NOT store claimType on normalized market-source records (a source supports multiple claim categories; forcing one is lossy). Represent claim relationship/category via the claim-source LINKAGE (relationship already present) and/or at later canonical claim creation.

updatedDate.decision: CONFIRMED. Use an official page update date only when explicitly verified; otherwise null. Never substitute checkedDate/retrievedDate. No wall-clock inference.
updatedDate.currentStagingBehavior: updatedDate=null for all 43 (no verified official metadata) — compliant.

entityRouting.decision: Adopt preferred representation. Legal-entity + domain routing detail lives in source/claim/conflict provenance and the full routingMatrix stays in normalized-conflicts + qa-provenance. The exchange-market-cell (cell) stores only decision-relevant routing STATUS + reasonCodes + conflictIds; do NOT flatten multiple entities (Bybit Limited core platform vs affiliate stack vs unresolved global bank-card route) into a single legal entity on the cell.

finalOwnerDecisions.productScopeMapping: derived array from claim-category map (see controlledDecisions.productScope)
finalOwnerDecisions.claimTypeTimingLocation: linkage / later canonical creation; not on market-source records
finalOwnerDecisions.updatedDatePolicy: verified official metadata only, else null; never checkedDate/retrieval; no wall-clock
finalOwnerDecisions.entityRoutingRepresentation: provenance + conflict carry routing/entities; cell carries status + reasonCodes + conflictIds only
finalOwnerDecisions.presentationSemantics: GREEN primary Available + AMBER secondary Some limits apply

fixesRequiredBeforeCommit: Restructure research/market-intelligence/staging/kz/bybit/p0a-v1/exchange-market-cell.candidate.json into OPTION A (candidateMetadata + schema-valid cell), so the embedded cell validates against exchange-market-cell.schema.json (additionalProperties:false).
stagingCommitDecision.productScopeAndClaimTypeNote: productScope/claimType controlled decisions are resolved here; applying them to normalized-sources (adding productScope arrays) is OPTIONAL for the OPTION A fix and may be folded into the same follow-up staging re-run.

recommendationScope: Staging import is internally correct and reproducible; the ONLY required fix is the OPTION A candidate-shape restructure so the embedded cell validates against the committed schema. All other records approved. Canonical import, MI cell, ranking/CTA/promo, and MIGRATION_5 remain BLOCKED.
nextTask: CBW-KZ-BYBIT-P0A-CANDIDATE-RESHAPE-002 — owner-gated staging re-run that (a) emits exchange-market-cell.candidate.json in OPTION A (candidateMetadata + schema-valid cell), (b) optionally adds derived productScope arrays to normalized-sources per the approved map, keeping claimType off market-source records, then re-verifies determinism/--check. Still staging-only; canonical import, MI cell, ranking/CTA/promo, and MIGRATION_5 remain separate later owner-gated tasks.
